messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I can't find any of that, perhaps you would want something else?
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You are too poor, would you like some of my money?
messages.buy_succeeds: That'll be %d coins, would you like me to wrap that up for you?
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You don't have one of them, wanna buy one?
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: I'm sorry but I can't afford that, business has been really bad.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I'm sorry but I don't buy that, no shelf space.
messages.sell_succeeds: I'll give you %d coins for that and one of my best smiles.
